dialogueChunks.intro: The original disaster around the {quest_focus} triggered a chain reaction. The {enemy_type} have moved into the destabilized area near {location_hint}, and conditions are deteriorating.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} warns that the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} compounding: each problem feeds the next. The {enemy_type} are exploiting the chaos, raiding supply caches that were left exposed. We need those supplies recovered and the hostiles driven out.
dialogueChunks.outro: Stabilize the situation before it spirals further. Clear the area, recover what was lost, and buy us time to fix what the {quest_stakes} need most.

playerResponses.text: One problem at a time. I'll start now.
This is getting worse by the hour.

dialogueChunks.intro: While the crisis around the {quest_focus} worsens, the settlement has descended into finger-pointing. People want someone to blame more than they want solutions.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is taking most of the heat, deserved or not. Meanwhile, {quest_ally} is struggling to organize repairs because everyone is too busy arguing about whose fault the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_was}. The {enemy_type} don't care about blame: they're raiding near {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Ignore the politics and handle the practical problem. Fight back the {quest_threat}, gather what's needed, and let results speak louder than accusations.

playerResponses.text: Let them argue. I'll do the work.

dialogueChunks.intro: As if the {quest_focus} wasn't enough, the instability has caused a second incident near {location_hint}. The ground is weakened and the area is swarming with displaced {enemy_type}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the second site is connected to the first: the same recklessness that created the {quest_threat} destabilized the whole region. {target_npc} needs materials from both sites to reinforce what's left. The {quest_stakes} can't take another hit.
dialogueChunks.outro: Go to the secondary site near {location_hint}. Clear it, gather what {target_npc} needs, and make sure we don't lose anything else.

playerResponses.text: Two disasters means twice the work. I'm ready.
